parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human in a natural outdoor setting. Lighting, shadows, and movements are consistent with standard smartphone video recording.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, dark brown hair. She is wearing large aviator-style sunglasses with a tortoiseshell detail on the top bar.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey, long-sleeved button-up shirt worn over a dark top. She has a delicate gold necklace and a gold ring on her right hand.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, animated, and conversational, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.setting: Outdoors, daytime. Clear blue sky with scattered clouds. Background includes a building with a colorful mural, a bare tree, and the edge of a white patio umbrella.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a close-up shot, positioned slightly off-center. She is outdoors on a bright, sunny day. The background features a clear blue sky with a few clouds, a building adorned with a colorful mural, a leafless tree, and a parked red vehicle. The edge of a white patio umbrella is visible on the left side of the frame. Character A is actively gesturing with her hands as she speaks, looking slightly off-camera. The lighting is natural and bright, casting soft shadows.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous close-up shot of Character A telling a story to someone off-camera. The setting is outdoors on a sunny day. A static text overlay sits at the top of the screen, while dynamic subtitles appear in the lower third, translating or transcribing the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: ¿De dónde eres? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: And he was like, soy de Colombia. [I'm from Colombia.] And I was like, ay, qué chévere, soy de Ecuador. [oh, how cool, I'm from Ecuador.] And then he went as far as to say, hablas muy bien el español. [you speak Spanish very well.] So I'm sitting in the back of this Uber, and I'm texting my mom immediately. I kid you not, I was like, mi vida está completa porque me dijo que hablo muy bien el español. [my life is complete because he told me I speak Spanish very well.]
Unknown speaker says: When did you even learn Spanish?
Character A says: I've been using this new app called Speak, and I use it for literally like 10 minutes a day. And now I can actually apply it in real life, and patting myself on the back, honestly.
scenes.on_screen_text:
She was SHOOK I spoke Spanish 😂
Where are you from?
I'm from Colombia.
I'm from Ecuador.
You speak Spanish really well.
My life is complete
because he said
I spoke Spanish really well.
When did you even learn Spanish?

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, bright blue background fills the entire frame. There are no characters, props, or other visual elements present.

scenes.visual_description: A simple end card consisting of a solid blue background. White text is centered on the screen, displaying the brand name and a call to action.
